title: e2e: play kube seccomp: missing output in logs
body:
Followup to #18570 (add missing podman-wait). Tests are still flaking, even after `podman wait`:
```
[It] podman play kube seccomp container level
...
# podman [options] wait testPod-testCtr
1   <-- expected
# podman [options] logs testPod-testCtr
   <-- empty!
[FAILED] Expected '' to contain substring 'getcwd: Operation not permitted'
```
[f37 root](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5644154944880640/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-play-kube-seccomp-container-level--1), and it failed *two* tests: the `seccomp pod level` one also.

Note that this is podman, not podman-remote (podman-remote has its own log-related flakes)

comments.body: Merging into #18501. We have a LOT of different podman-logs flakes, let's try to track them in one place.
